overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an open-world game showing a large brown bear moving through a sunlit forest clearing near a beach. The camera follows the bear as it walks through tall grass, roars, and forages, with the camera circling around to capture close-up details of the animal.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy forest clearing with coastal beach visible in distance

agents.ego_description: cautiously following the bear from behind while maintaining a safe distance through the tall grass

notable_agents.action: walking steadily through the grassy clearing toward the beach area

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees surrounding the clearing on all sides
open area filled with tall green grass and scattered wildflowers
sandy shoreline visible through the trees in the distance
small leafy bush growing at the edge of the clearing

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a large brown bear walking away from the camera through a sunlit forest clearing. Tall pine trees frame the scene on both sides while a sandy beach is visible in the distant background. The bear moves steadily through the tall grass as the camera follows from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy forest clearing with dense underbrush

events.description: bear stops walking and opens its mouth wide in a roar or yawn
camera moves extremely close to the bear's head for a detailed view of its face

agents.ego_description: shifting to the side of the bear and moving closer to capture a profile view

notable_agents.action: standing still and roaring with mouth open, showing teeth

entered.detail: leafy green bush close to the camera on the left side

segments.scene_description: The camera moves to the side of the bear as it pauses and opens its mouth in a roar. The view shifts to an extreme close-up of the bear's head and fur texture. The beach is no longer visible as the camera focuses on the bear's profile against the backdrop of pine trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy clearing with dirt patches near the forest edge

events.description: camera circles around to the rear of the bear showing its back and hind legs
bear lowers its head to sniff or forage in the grass

agents.ego_description: circling around to the rear of the bear to observe its movement and behavior from behind

notable_agents.action: walking slowly with head lowered toward the ground, appearing to forage

entered.detail: patch of exposed dirt and earth among the grass
small yellow flowers scattered throughout the tall grass

segments.scene_description: The camera circles around to show the bear from behind, capturing close-up details of its fur and hindquarters. The bear continues walking slowly with its head lowered toward the ground, appearing to sniff or forage. Yellow wildflowers are visible in the grass as the camera maintains its position near the animal's rear.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide view of a bear in a forest clearing to an intimate, detailed study of the animal's movements. It begins by following the bear from behind as it walks through tall grass toward a distant sandy beach framed by towering pine trees. As the bear pauses to roar, the camera glides to the side and pushes in for an extreme close-up of the bear's head and fur, causing the beach to disappear from view. The scene then shifts as the camera circles around to the rear, capturing the texture of the hindquarters while the bear lowers its head to forage. Finally, the perspective remains close to the animal as it moves slowly through a patch of yellow wildflowers under the forest canopy.
